title: Local Hero
caption: A Houston oil exec sent to buy a Scottish village, and the slow Highland tide that buys him back.

title: Burning
caption: The greenhouse scene where you realize the whole film has been about the boy's hunger, not the mystery.

title: Decision to Leave
caption: An insomniac detective watches a suspect through a telephoto lens until the lens becomes the love affair.

title: Past Lives
caption: Two old friends sit at a bar in the East Village and twenty-four years dissolve into the ice cubes.

title: Aftersun
caption: A father teaches his daughter to dance in a Turkish hotel, and the camcorder pixelates a grief she won't understand for twenty years.

title: Pig
caption: Nicolas Cage, a stolen truffle pig, and a four-course Portland fine-dining revenge that turns into something kinder.

title: Hit Man
caption: A community-college philosophy professor moonlights as a fake hitman and quietly discovers he's a better self in costume.

title: The Holdovers
caption: A boarding-school Christmas with three strangers, a bottle of Jim Beam, and the cafeteria manager singing along to the radio.

title: Lady Bird
caption: A senior-year mother-daughter fight in a Sacramento Goodwill parking lot, played without a single false note.

title: Phantom Thread
caption: A 1950s London couturier meets a waitress, and the omelette becomes the most dangerous thing in the house.

title: Drive
caption: An elevator, a kiss, a stomp — the moment a getaway driver decides what kind of fairy tale he's in.

title: Nightcrawler
caption: Jake Gyllenhaal as a wide-eyed sociopath learning that LA's freeway scanner is the only news cycle that matters.

title: Minding the Gap
caption: Three Rockford skateboarders grow up on camera, and you watch the documentary become an inventory of inherited violence.

title: The Red Shoes
caption: A 1948 Technicolor ballet that invented every music video — the seventeen-minute centerpiece is still the bar.

title: Paddington 2
caption: A bear, a pop-up book, and the most morally serious film of the decade dressed as a children's movie.
